jsonLd.title: Haldiram's is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Haldiram's is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Chennai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Haldiram's:
Haldiram's is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Haldiram's!
